Welcome to the Sikh Society

Exploring society, culture, and community through research, events, and collaboration.

Our society brings together students and scholars to examine social structures, identities, and civic life. Join us for talks, workshops, and collaborative projects throughout the year.

Join Us Donate

Support our mission to foster Sikh values, learning, and community service and community impact.
